hash_methods.row_sha256: sha256(raw JSONL line bytes including trailing newline when present)
hash_methods.unique_solution_hash: Cluster 1 row field, recomputed with cluster1.results.dataclass.compute_unique_solution_hash for match counts

invariants: seed_schedule is explicit for every selected replay artifact
base_seed equals frozen generation_seed for selected Cluster 1 rows
attempt_index equals generation_index for selected Cluster 1 rows
one replay row exists for each (kernel_class, dtype, base_seed) pair
fresh generated conditions must consume the selected replay schedule
runner must reject prompt/model/dtype/temperature/token-budget mismatches before generation
aggregation must reject missing, duplicate, or metadata-mismatched pairs
no fallback seed generation is allowed when schedule metadata is missing

purpose: Frozen Cluster 1 replay-control manifest for Cluster 2 Phase -1; canonical source for paired-by-seed replay schedules.
